name: THE BELMONT FRANKLIN GROUP
description_short: The Belmont Franklin Group provides fast small business loans with funding in as little as 24-48 hours, focusing on cash flow and business bank activity rather than personal credit scores.
description_long:
The Belmont Franklin Group is a small business lender based in Houston, Texas (801 Travis St., Suite 2101) that specializes in streamlined business financing for entrepreneurs and established companies. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending, emphasizing speed and accessibility over conventional credit requirements. They claim a 95% approval rate and market themselves as the fastest funding option in their space with the tagline 'NOBODY FUNDS FASTER THAN US!'

The company offers small business loans with flexible terms ranging from 3-24 months, direct bank account deposits, and automatic ACH repayment options. Their primary underwriting criteria focus on business cash flow (minimum $5,000 monthly deposits), company bank account balances, and deposit frequency rather than personal credit history. Loan amounts are determined by these business metrics, with higher approval amounts available to businesses demonstrating stronger cash flow and account activity (ideally 7+ deposits per month). Applications are submitted online with three months of business bank statements and decisions are promised within 24 hours.

The Belmont Franklin Group distinguishes itself through several claimed unique features: the ability to refinance loans every 60 days, a 10% discount payoff option available at any point during the loan term, and financing of all lender fees so borrowers receive the full net loan amount. They emphasize relationship-based lending rather than transactional lending, positioning themselves as willing to work with businesses that may have been denied by traditional lenders. The company highlights its focus on "the health of your business—not your personal credit score" and claims to look for reasons to approve rather than deny applications.

However, prospective borrowers should note several limitations: the company provides minimal information about actual interest rates, APRs, or fee structures on their public website. The daily or weekly ACH repayment schedule could strain cash flow for some businesses. No third-party reviews, regulatory filings, or Better Business Bureau information are accessible from the provided website content, making independent verification of claims like the 95% approval rate impossible. The marketing language emphasizes speed and approval rates but lacks transparency about true borrowing costs.
pros: Fast funding with approval in as little as 24 hours and deposits within 1 business day
Business-focused underwriting using cash flow and bank activity rather than personal credit scores
Flexible loan terms ranging from 3 to 24 months with customizable funding amounts
Refinancing option available every 60 days for flexibility
10% discount payoff option available at any point during the loan term
All lender fees financed into the loan amount so borrowers receive the full net amount
Simple one-page application process requiring only basic documentation (3 months bank statements)
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website, making true cost of borrowing unclear
Daily or weekly ACH repayment schedule may create cash flow strain for businesses with irregular revenue
Requires minimum $5,000 monthly business deposits to qualify, limiting access for very new or seasonal businesses
No independent verification available (no BBB rating, customer reviews, or regulatory information provided)
Marketing claims like '95% approval rate' lack third-party validation or context about actual loan amounts offered
best_for: Established small businesses with consistent monthly revenue of at least $5,000 and regular bank deposits
Business owners with poor personal credit who have strong business cash flow and bank activity
Companies needing quick working capital without lengthy traditional bank approval processes
Entrepreneurs seeking short-term financing flexibility with refinancing options
diagnosis: The Belmont Franklin Group is best for established small businesses with consistent cash flow and regular bank deposits seeking fast funding without personal credit scrutiny. The main caveat is that the company provides zero transparency on actual interest rates, APRs, or fee structures, making it impossible to compare true borrowing costs against other options—prospective borrowers must contact directly for pricing information.
services: Small business loans with 3-24 month terms
Online merchant application and approval process
Fast underwriting based on business cash flow and bank activity
Early payoff discount of 10% at any time during loan term
Financing of all lender fees into loan amount
Custom-tailored financing solutions for non-traditional businesses
